instructions.purpose: Analyze incoming messages and determine their importance level for memory storage. This helps prioritize which messages should be retained long-term versus discarded.

tool.name: define-message-importance
tool.description: Evaluates a message's significance based on content, context, and potential future value. Returns an importance level (low, medium, high) with a brief reasoning.

instructions.language_note: The message to be analyzed may be in any language (e.g., Polish, English, Spanish). Analyze the semantic meaning and context regardless of the language used. Always provide reasoning in English.

level.name: low
level.criteria: - Casual greetings or pleasantries ("hey", "hi", "hello", "siema", "cześć") - Acknowledgments without substantive content ("ok", "got it", "understood", "rozumiem") - Temporary or time-sensitive information that will not matter later - Repetitive confirmations or clarifications - Emotional reactions without context ("lol", "haha", "xd")

level.name: medium
level.criteria: - Preferences mentioned in passing ("I prefer", "I like", "I dislike", "wolę", "lubię") - Scheduling discussions without firm commitments - References to ongoing tasks or plans without concrete details - Questions and answers about general knowledge - Casual mentions of activities or interests
level.retention: Keep for several weeks, review periodically

level.name: high
level.criteria: - Explicit preferences or strong opinions ("I always want", "I never", "zawsze chcę", "nigdy nie") - Important personal information (work schedule, health, family details) - Firm commitments or promises made by either party - Recurring issues or patterns mentioned by the user - Significant decisions or changes in plans - Emotional states that indicate important context - Instructions for how the assistant should behave or address the user
level.retention: Keep indefinitely, reference in future conversations

usage_rules.rule: Call this tool for every incoming message before responding
Provide concise reasoning explaining the importance assignment
When in doubt between two levels, choose the higher one
Consider the user's emotional state and context, not just keywords
The same phrase in different contexts may have different importance
Always analyze messages in their original language - do not translate before evaluating

example.message: "Ehh, w sumie to fajnie by było jakbyś czasem zwracał się do mnie Misiu"
example.reasoning: User is sharing a preference about how they want to be addressed (nickname "Misiu"). This is a behavioral instruction that should be remembered for future interactions.
Casual greeting without substantive content. No need to retain long-term.

example.message: "bardziej lubię herbatę niż kawę" / "I prefer tea over coffee"
example.reasoning: Preference mentioned in passing. May be relevant for future beverage recommendations or when offering drinks.
